items.title: volcengine/OpenViking
items.content:
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

Language: Python
Stars: 11506
Forks: 787
items.contentSnippet:
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving. 
Language: Python 
Stars: 11506 
Forks: 787
items.creator: volcengine
items.summary: OpenViking是火山引擎开源的AI Agent上下文数据库，通过文件系统范式统一管理Agent所需的memory（记忆）、resources（资源）和skills（技能），实现层级上下文传递和自演化能力，为AI Agent开发提供基础设施支持。
items.ai_reason: AI Agent上下文数据库开源项目，火山引擎出品，使用文件系统范式统一管理memory/resources/skills，具有较高实用价值和创新性，11506 stars表明有社区认可度

items.title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
items.content:
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

Language: TypeScript
Stars: 13260
Forks: 1569
items.contentSnippet:
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration 
Language: TypeScript 
Stars: 13260 
Forks: 1569
items.creator: abhigyanpatwari
items.summary: GitNexus是一个客户端代码智能知识图谱引擎，完全在浏览器中运行。用户可导入GitHub仓库或ZIP文件，获取交互式知识图谱和内置的Graph RAG代理，非常适合代码探索。使用TypeScript开发，拥有约1.3万星标，是代码分析和可视化领域的有价值工具。
items.ai_reason: 创新的客户端知识图谱工具，零服务器架构，可在浏览器中直接分析GitHub仓库，13260星表明其高价值和受欢迎程度
